layer_camera: Captured with a professional full-frame mirrorless camera using an 85mm prime lens at f/2.8, creating natural depth of field and soft background bokeh.
layer_environment: Authentic real-world environment with natural details, textures, and context-appropriate elements.
layer_lighting: Natural daylight with physically accurate shadows, reflections, and realistic light falloff.
layer_textures: Fine micro-textures visible on all surfaces, materials, skin, and fabrics.
layer_color: True-to-life color science, natural RAW photograph look with subtle film grain.
layer_style: Editorial photography style, extremely detailed, indistinguishable from a real photograph.
